_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assess all the configuration management (change configuration/release management) processes.
reference_document_element_description: Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, scope change management, and executive status reporting.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-T-005 (TF, cosine: 0.606), AI-T-021 (AI, cosine: 0.586).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.318). Shared vocabulary: [change, management]. DCWF-only terms [assess, configuration, processes, release] vs WIDAI-only terms [coordination, execution, executive, issue, manage, program] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.886, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 15-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.8%). "Assess all the configuration management (change configuration/release management" and "Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.614 > STS 0.318 (gap +0.295). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [change, management] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [change, management]. DCWF-only: [assess, configuration, processes, release]. WIDAI-only: [coordination, execution, executive, issue, manage, program].

signals.detail: STS 0.318 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.295 with low STS 0.318. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
